findings.title: STATUS.md stale day counts (SPRINT-B 40→41, Retell R1 41→42)
findings.detail: STATUS.md 'In flight' section referenced SPRINT-B as 40 days overdue and Retell R1 as 41 days overdue. The correct values as of 2026-07-01 are 41 and 42 days respectively. Q3 start referenced as TOMORROW when Q3 started TODAY.
findings.fix_sketch: Update day counts and replace TOMORROW with TODAY throughout STATUS.md.

findings.title: KPI.md Q3 banner says TOMORROW, Q3 has started TODAY
findings.detail: KPI.md Q3 2026 section ACTION REQUIRED banner referenced Q3 starting TOMORROW (2026-07-01) and Retell R1 as 41 days overdue. As of 2026-07-01 Q3 has started and the overdue count is 42 days. Footer dates also lagged at 2026-06-30.
findings.fix_sketch: Update Q3 ACTION REQUIRED banner to say TODAY, update Retell R1 count to 42, update footer dates.

findings.title: ROADMAP.md Q3 blocking decision elapsed count shows 41, should be 42
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md Q3 blocking decision warning referenced 41 days elapsed and 'as of 2026-06-30'. As of 2026-07-01 the count is 42 days. Also missing note that Q3 has now started. Frontmatter last_updated and footer dates also lagged.
findings.fix_sketch: Update elapsed count to 42, update 'as of' date, add Q3-started note, update frontmatter + footer dates.

findings.title: CHANGELOG.md missing 2026-07-01 nightly audit entry
findings.detail: CHANGELOG.md had no entry for the 2026-07-01 nightly audit session. All other nightly audit sessions have a corresponding CHANGELOG entry.
findings.fix_sketch: Add 2026-07-01 nightly audit entry under [Unreleased] > Changed, documenting all 4 COSMETIC findings fixed.

findings.title: SPRINT-2026-05-B still not created (day 41 overdue)
findings.detail: SPRINT-2026-05-B was referenced since 2026-05-21 but has not been created. As of 2026-07-01 this is 41 days overdue. There is no active sprint document, blocking all milestone progress. Q3 has started with zero OKRs defined.
findings.fix_sketch: Sebastian + Esme must create SPRINT-2026-05-B (or SPRINT-2026-07-A) with realistic capacity and define Q3 OKRs. Cannot be fixed by an automated audit agent.

findings.title: Retell R1 research decision 42 days overdue
findings.detail: ADR-0011 has been pending Esme's Retell R1 research confirmation for 42 days as of 2026-07-01. M-005 through M-007, M-010, and M-015 are all blocked on this decision. Q3 OKRs cannot be finalized until this is resolved.
findings.fix_sketch: Esme must deliver Retell R1 research and confirm platform choice. Sebastian must set a hard deadline. Cannot be fixed by an automated audit agent.
